summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the Coal & Curry South Indian restaurant app. Most core requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-14) show clear implementation evidence. However, several specific acceptance criteria cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff, and a few requirements have partial or missing evidence. Key gaps include: no evidence of robots.txt and sitemap.xml updates. A Loyalty page is added that was not requested. Logo filename differs from specification.

missing_requirements.requirement: robots.txt allows all crawlers except /cart and /checkout; sitemap.xml lists all public routes
missing_requirements.reason: No diff evidence shows frontend/public/robots.txt or frontend/public/sitemap.xml being modified or created.

hallucinated_features.description: Loyalty Program page (/loyalty route) added to the app
hallucinated_features.reason: A Loyalty page and route were added in App.tsx and Footer quickLinks, but no Loyalty program was requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: FloatingReserveButton component — a floating Reserve button fixed to bottom-right separate from the chatbot widget
hallucinated_features.reason: No floating reservation button was requested. The spec only requested a chatbot widget fixed to the bottom-right corner. This adds an extra floating UI element not in the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Logo image referenced as coal-curry-logo-circular.dim_512x512.png in Navbar and Footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies the logo image filename as logo.dim_400x400.png at 400x400. The implementation uses a different filename and dimensions not listed in the required generated assets.
